title: phyllanthus carlottae
intro: Phyllanthus carlottae, also known as the Carlotta tree or Sabah tree, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to Borneo and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus carlottae is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and roots are used to create a variety of remedies.
